summary: Backend testing for Full Arch fields (available_interarch_space, opposing_arch) completed successfully. All 11 tests passed. Verified: (1) POST /api/procedures accepts new fields, (2) GET /api/procedures/{id} returns stored values, (3) PDF generation includes 'Available Interarch Space: X mm' and 'Opposing Arch: Y', (4) All 4 opposing_arch options work (Natural Dentition, Fixed Implant Prosthesis, Removable Prosthesis, Edentulous), (5) Backward compatibility for procedures without new fields, (6) PDF generation with both edentulous site fields and full arch fields together, (7) All on 4/6/X procedure types work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ProcedureCreate schema correctly includes available_interarch_space (Optional[str], max_length=20) and opposing_arch (Optional[str], max_length=50) at lines 260-261
ProcedureUpdate schema correctly includes the same fields for updates at lines 322-323
PDF generator at lines 2030-2033 correctly outputs 'Available Interarch Space: X mm' and 'Opposing Arch: Y' in Occlusal Analysis section
Frontend new-procedure.tsx has sectionTitle, subSectionTitle, and label styles all set to #1565C0 (blue) at lines 1057-1060
Frontend submit-phase2/[id].tsx has sectionTitle and label styles set to #1565C0 at lines 618, 620
Frontend submit-stage2-surgical/[id].tsx has sectionTitle and label styles set to #1565C0 at lines 334, 341
Frontend new-procedure.tsx has Available Interarch Space text input at line 780 and Opposing Arch dropdown with 4 options at lines 784-786
Frontend [id].tsx displays available_interarch_space and opposing_arch in case detail view at lines 674-678
seed_data_creation: None - test procedures created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full Arch fields (available_interarch_space, opposing_arch) fully tested. Key verifications: (1) Fields stored as strings (e.g., '18', 'Natural Dentition'), (2) PDF shows 'Available Interarch Space: 18 mm' and 'Opposing Arch: Natural Dentition' in Occlusal Analysis section, (3) All 4 opposing_arch options work: Natural Dentition, Fixed Implant Prosthesis, Removable Prosthesis, Edentulous, (4) Works with All on 4, All on 6, and All on X procedure types, (5) Backward compatibility maintained - procedures without new fields still work.
